  "claims": [
    "California's housing shortage and transit needs are urgent.",
    "Current permitting processes in California are too slow to meet housing and transit challenges.",
    "Significant delays in housing delivery are caused by permitting obstacles.",
    "Prolonged CEQA-related litigation has delayed the Regional Connector transit project.",
